courseSubtitle: Learn the fundamentals of web development from HTML to deployment phase.
courseDescription: This beginner-friendly course walks you through the foundations of web development—from structuring pages with HTML to styling with CSS, interactivity with JavaScript, and finally connecting to databases and deploying real-world applications. No prior experience needed!

campLeader.name: Varshita Palleti
bio: Varshita is a passionate web educator and developer with a mission to simplify learning has built projects, blending both design and development
Actively participated in hackathons, gaining real-world problem-solving experience through rapid prototyping and collaboration.
Currently leading this course to help beginners kickstart their journey in web development and build a solid project-ready foundation.

benefits.text: This course introduces the core technologies used to build websites and web applications. By the end of the course, you'll be able to create responsive, interactive, and real-world websites and host them live.

list.title: Complete Foundation
list.content: From basic tags to responsive layouts, learn the building blocks of the web step by step.

list.title: Interactive Learning
list.content: Hands-on codelabs and quizzes make it easier to grasp complex and tricky concepts quickly.

list.title: Modern Tools
list.content: Get introduced to TailwindCSS, GitHub, Firebase, and Postman to build full-stack apps.

list.title: Project Ready
list.content: By the end of the course, deploy your project online and build your web developer portfolio.
